summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. This is not a dedupe cluster, so no shared canonical is invented. Hydrated non-security PRs are kept independently for maintainer review. Refs with security-boundary/security-sensitive signals from the job body are quarantined with non-mutating route_security actions. Refs missing hydrated live state remain scoped needs_human only where no narrower safe non-mutating classification is available.
